task_completion.description: Open the 4StoreyBuilding project in the building energy modeling software.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The software interface is open with '4StoreyBuilding' visible in the title bar, project tree, or recent files list.

task_completion.description: Navigate to the Air-Side HVAC systems component tree or spreadsheet view.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The interface displays the list or properties of the HVAC systems, specifically showing Packaged Single Zone (PSZ) systems for the Ground, Middle, and Top floors.

task_completion.description: Set the Cooling Sizing Ratio to 1.0 for all 12 perimeter systems.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The 'Cooling Sizing Ratio' (or COOL-SIZING-RATI) field is explicitly set to 1.0 for perimeter systems (systems with S, E, N, W in their names, e.g., G.S11, M.E22, T.W34).

task_completion.description: Ensure Core systems and Heating Sizing Ratios are not modified.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Core systems (e.g., G.C15, M.C25, T.C35) and Heating Sizing Ratios retain their original values (typically 1.15 or default) and are clearly not set to 1.0.

task_completion.description: Run the full annual DOE-2.2 simulation.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A simulation progress window, a 'Simulation Complete' dialog, or the DOE-2.2 simulation engine is shown actively running.

task_completion.description: Save the project and generate the simulation output file.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The agent clicks the Save icon, uses File -> Save, or a file explorer shows the newly generated '4StoreyBuilding.sim' file in the project directory.

integrity.description: Verify the agent used the actual building energy modeling software (e.g., eQUEST) or a legitimate text editor to modify the model.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots show interaction with a real GUI or text editor, rather than just echoing text to a terminal or mocking the output.

integrity.description: Verify the simulation was actually executed through the software's engine.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots show actual simulation progress or completion dialogs, not just terminal commands creating an empty file named '4StoreyBuilding.sim'.

integrity.description: Verify the agent only modified the specified cooling sizing ratios.
integrity.visual_evidence: There is no evidence of the agent deleting systems, altering unrelated building parameters, or modifying the simulation weather/run periods to bypass the full annual simulation.

privileged_info_for_vlm: The building model is '4StoreyBuilding'. There are exactly 12 perimeter systems (naming convention: [G,M,T].[S,E,N,W][1-3][1-4], e.g., G.S11, M.E22, T.W34) and 3 core systems (G.C15, M.C25, T.C35). The target Cooling Sizing Ratio (COOL-SIZING-RATI) for the 12 perimeter systems must be exactly 1.0. Core systems and Heating Sizing Ratios must remain unchanged (default is typically 1.15). The simulation output file generated should be named '4StoreyBuilding.sim'.
